title: Luna of the Broken Pack
description: The Greywater pack has no alpha, no territory, and no future — just forty starving wolves squatting in a dead mill town and a long list of people who'd like them gone. When the bond chooses Nessa, the pack's least important member, as luna to a wandering alpha who could save them all, she has to decide whether a crown is a gift or just a heavier way to be used.
